key.name: mosque-url
key.description: Full Mawaqit URL for your mosque (e.g. https://mawaqit.net/en/w/arrahmaan-dordrecht)

key.name: cached-data
key.description: JSON string of last successfully fetched prayer data for offline fallback

key.name: notifications-enabled
key.description: Show a notification when each prayer time arrives

key.name: language
key.description: Language for prayer names and UI strings (en, ar, fr, tr)

key.name: adhan-enabled
key.description: Play adhan audio at prayer time

key.name: adhan-path
key.description: Absolute path to adhan audio file

key.name: display-mode
key.description: Panel display mode: countdown, time, name, compact, or icon

key.name: countdown-format
key.description: Countdown display format: compact (-2h15m) or full (-2h 15m)

key.name: prayer-notification-settings
key.description: JSON object with enabled, reminder_minutes, and adhan_enabled per prayer

key.name: prayer-offsets
key.description: JSON object with minute offsets (-60 to +60) per prayer

key.name: saved-mosques
key.description: JSON array of saved mosques with url and name
